title: BossCraft Respawn : Overlord
description: Unofficial Port of BossCraft and BossCraft2 Content
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d424ad94670c55245a3c070c4ae8f642e523ca.png)
Made by MCreator.
# Disclaimer
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.
Also, I don't have the time, so I can't provide detailed support.

# About
This mod is addon of BossCraftRespawn an **unofficial port** of the **1.3.2 mod "BossCraft" created by Sthullen**.

It interprets and adds elements from BossCraft2 and content that was cut from BossCraft.
It includes some original elements that are different from the original mod.

BossCraft adds unique mobs, bosses, and loot for each biome.

To reiterate, this mod is an **unofficial port** made by fans, and has no direct relationship with the original author or the original mod.

If there is any problem, it will be removed.

**Original Forum**

[https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291146-1-6-4-forge-smp-bosscraft-2-extreme-biome-boss](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291146-1-6-4-forge-smp-bosscraft-2-extreme-biome-boss)

# Add Content

## 1.New Mobs
![NewBosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2b03f473cfa393cd49b8a273f61162224c2d55.png)

Scorpion & King Scorpion from BossCraft2

Ice Devil and the final boss Overlord from BossCraft
(not implemented in the original mod)

Ice Servant created as a minion of Ice Devil

## 2.Souls
![Souls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97317479f45657a32199ba215a98611f45d2d47b.png)

Souls from BossCraft2.
They can be created from items from each boss, and can be activated to gain power.

But what happens if you use them for a long time...?

## 3.Extra Content
![GrmReaper&SpiderQueen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38885a34fcf77d238a1e5d564fcff74b8cc1628f.png)

The Grim Reaper now has the lightning attack from BossCraft2

The Spider Queen now has a unique weapon, the Spiderstinger
